---
title: "Suggested Linear Path"
---

# Suggested Linear Path

This path gives a traditional sequence through the resource, organized by the CPS learning model:

1. **Constructs** — foundational quantities that appear inside multiple methods
2. **Procedures** — inferential techniques that require decision logic
3. **Scripts** — fixed-sequence workflows to practice until automatic

---

## Unit 1: Foundations

Start here to build the core concepts everything else depends on.

| Step | Topic | Type | Link |
|------|-------|------|------|
| 1 | Probability and sample spaces | Construct | [Lesson](lessons/foundations/sampling-distributions.qmd) |
| 2 | Distributions (normal, t, χ², F) | Construct | [Lesson](lessons/foundations/sampling-distributions.qmd) |
| 3 | Standard error — the universal SE | Construct | [Lesson](lessons/foundations/standard-error.qmd) |
| 4 | Confidence intervals | Procedure | [Lesson](lessons/foundations/confidence-intervals.qmd) |

---

## Unit 2: Inference

| Step | Topic | Type | Link |
|------|-------|------|------|
| 5 | Hypothesis testing — 7-step framework | Procedure | [Lesson](lessons/inference/hypothesis-testing.qmd) |
| 6 | One- and two-sample t-tests | Procedure | [Lesson](lessons/inference/t-tests.qmd) |
| 7 | Chi-square and proportions | Procedure | [Lesson](lessons/inference/hypothesis-testing.qmd) |
| 8 | One-way ANOVA (introduction) | Procedure | [Lesson](lessons/inference/anova.qmd) |

---

## Unit 3: Regression

| Step | Topic | Type | Link |
|------|-------|------|------|
| 9 | Simple linear regression | Procedure | [Lesson](lessons/regression/simple-linear-regression.qmd) |
| 10 | Multiple regression | Procedure | [Lesson](lessons/regression/multiple-regression.qmd) |
| 11 | Model diagnostics and adequacy | Script | [Lesson](lessons/regression/diagnostics.qmd) |

---

## Unit 4: Quality and Process Methods

| Step | Topic | Type | Link |
|------|-------|------|------|
| 12 | Control chart concepts | Procedure | [Lesson](lessons/quality-methods/control-charts.qmd) |
| 13 | X̄/R and X̄/S charts | Script | [Lesson](lessons/quality-methods/xbar-r-charts.qmd) |
| 14 | p, c, and u charts | Script | [Lesson](lessons/quality-methods/p-c-u-charts.qmd) |

---

## Unit 5: Experimental Design

| Step | Topic | Type | Link |
|------|-------|------|------|
| 15 | Completely randomized design (CRD) and one-way ANOVA | Procedure | [Lesson](lessons/experimental-design/crd-anova.qmd) |
| 16 | Factorial ANOVA (two- and three-factor) | Procedure | [Lesson](lessons/experimental-design/factorial-design.qmd) |
| 17 | 2^k factorial designs | Procedure | [Lesson](lessons/experimental-design/two-k-design.qmd) |

---

## Unit 6: Coding Fluency (Dojo)

Practice the R workflows until they are automatic.

| Drill | Skill | Link |
|-------|-------|------|
| Simulate the CLT | Sampling distributions, SE | [Drill](dojo/r-drills/simulate-clt.qmd) |
| Fit and interpret a regression model | lm(), anova(), summary(), predict() | [Drill](dojo/r-drills/fit-regression-model.qmd) |
| Build a control chart | qcc, xbar/R, p-chart, Cp/Cpk | [Drill](dojo/r-drills/build-control-chart.qmd) |
| Fill an ANOVA table | SS, MS, F, df reconstruction | [Drill](dojo/r-drills/fill-anova-table.qmd) |
| Factorial ANOVA in R | aov(), interaction plots, LSD | [Drill](dojo/r-drills/factorial-anova.qmd) |
